title: Mikey's Epic Mod
description: I made this out of boredom! Hope you like it! Forge only.
body:
Welcome to Mikey's Epic Mod! A Forge mod that adds magical stuff and mechanical stuff. Like magic beings and Robots. It also has a final boss to the mod that can only be spawned with commands because it is unfinished.

This mod adds:
Mobs:

     Village Guards: (Ranged and melee) Spawns anywhere. Will defend a village
     Magma Golem: (Tamed and untamed) Has to be spawned by player like an Iron Golem. Acts like a basic boss fight.
     Soul Magma Monster: Has to be spawned by player like an Iron Golem. Acts like a basic boss fight.
     Rocky: Once again, it has to be spawned by player like an Iron Golem. Acts like a stronger wolf!
     Robot: Spawns anywhere. Basic enemy that act like faster zombies!
     Azud: Has to be spawned by player like an Iron Golem. Same structure, just replace the pumpkin with a 
furnace. Serves as a basic boss fight.
     Blok: Has to be spawned with commands. Small, block sized enemy that you can stand on and is aggressive!
     Blok Brute: Has to be spawned with commands. Hostile block sized enemy that's stronger than a normal Blok!
     Main Terminal: Has to be spawned with commands! When this is properly implemented, it will be a boss fight!

Items:

     Mikey's Hammer: Secret hammer that can only be spawned with commands! Can shoot projectiles.
     OneShot: Secret weapon that can only be spawned with commands! Will kill most enemies instantly. This is a reference to something! If you recognize it then good job
     Blok Brute Blok: Red building block! Gained by killing a Blok Brute.
     Blok Block: Building and crafting block! when put with a gold ingot in a crafting table, it will make a green block!
     Blok Block Green: Made when combining a Blok Block and a Golden Ingot in a crafting table. Can be used to make the Blok Buster (Wasn't supposed to be a reference)
     Blok Buster: A ranged weapon that can deal high damage! (I swear it wasn't supposed to be a reference!)
     Flame Thrower: Throws flames! also turns every block it touches into magma. And I mean EVERY block! trying to fix that!
     Nether Portal Sword: Can only be obtained through creative or commands! will soon have a crafting recipe.
     Corruption Liquid Bucket: Spawns Corruption Liquid when used. Will damage and kill players. Will still kill players even if they're in creative! Can only be obtained through creative mode or creative!

That's all for now folks! Will soon change! ¡Adios amigos!
